$comment: Source of truth for Copilot per-group instruction summaries. Curated by /sync-to-copilot. Consumed by .claude/scripts/sync-copilot-workflows.cjs. Do NOT hand-edit the generated .github/**/*.instructions.md files — edit here and re-run the script.

goldenRules: **Side Effects** — Entity Event Handlers in `UseCaseEvents/`, NEVER in command handlers
**DTO Mapping** — DTOs own mapping via `PlatformEntityDto<TEntity, TKey>.MapToEntity()` or `PlatformDto<T>.MapToObject()`, NEVER map in handlers
**Cross-Service** — RabbitMQ message bus ONLY, NEVER direct database access
**Frontend State** — `PlatformVmStore` + `effectSimple()`, NEVER manual signals or direct `HttpClient`

**Base Classes** — Always extend `AppBaseComponent`/`AppBaseVmStoreComponent`/`AppBaseFormComponent` + `.pipe(this.untilDestroyed())` + BEM classes on all template elements. Extend `PlatformApiService` for HTTP calls.

keyFileLocations.description: Core framework library — CQRS, entities, validation, repositories, message bus abstractions
ASP.NET Core integration — controllers, middleware, DI
EF Core persistence provider (PostgreSQL, SQL Server)
Example app API host — controllers, DI modules, startup
Example app application layer — CQRS commands, queries, DTOs, event handlers
Example app domain layer — entities, repositories, domain events
Integration test suite for example app
Angular frontend app for TextSnippet example
Frontend framework core — base components, stores, API services, utilities

Frontend & E2E tests: cd src/Frontend/e2e && npx playwright test    # e2e

registry.title: Backend Patterns Reference
registry.summary: Canonical Easy.Platform backend conventions with `file:line` evidence — entities (`RootAuditedEntity`, `[ComputedEntityProperty]`, static `Expression` filters), repository pattern, CQRS command/query handlers, `PlatformValidationResult` fluent validation (never throw), DTO-owned mapping, entity event handlers for side effects (`UseCaseEvents/`), RabbitMQ message bus, and background jobs.
registry.whenToRead: Writing or modifying any backend code — CQRS commands/queries, entities, repositories, validation, DTOs, event handlers, message bus, migrations, or background jobs.

registry.title: Domain Entities Reference
registry.summary: Evidence-cited map of the TextSnippet domain model — entity base-class hierarchy (`RootEntity`/`RootAuditedEntity`/`IRowVersionEntity`), entity catalog, relationships, aggregate boundaries, DTO mapping ownership (`PlatformEntityDto.MapToEntity()`), value objects (`PlatformValueObject<T>.Validate()`), cross-service entity map via message bus, persistence, and frontend data models.
registry.whenToRead: Designing or changing domain entities, value objects, aggregates, DTO mapping, or entity relationships; verifying correct base classes and mapping ownership before generating code.

registry.title: Frontend Patterns Reference
registry.summary: Angular 19 + Nx + NgRx ComponentStore + Material 3 conventions — `AppBase*` component base classes (never extend `Platform*` directly), `PlatformVmStore` state with `effectSimple()`/`tapResponse()`, view-model pattern, `PlatformApiService` HTTP services, DTO patterns, reactive forms, `.pipe(this.untilDestroyed())` subscription cleanup, and BEM on every template element.
registry.whenToRead: Creating or modifying Angular components, stores, view models, API services, forms, or templates; ensuring leak-free subscriptions and correct base-class usage.

registry.title: SCSS Styling Guide
registry.summary: BEM + token-driven SCSS rules — `block__element--modifier` naming (with the project's standalone `--modifier` class variant bound via `[class.--modifier]`), two-tier platform-core/`$app-*` tokens, `@use`/`@forward` (never `@import`), `flex-layout-media()` responsive mixin (never raw `@media`), mixins/functions reference, color palette, and theming. NEVER hardcode colors, pixels, font sizes, or z-index.
registry.whenToRead: Writing or editing any `.scss`/`.css` — applying BEM classes, using design tokens, responsive layout, or theming.

registry.title: Integration Test Reference
registry.summary: Two integration-test styles — DEFAULT subcutaneous CQRS through real DI (no HTTP) extending `TextSnippetIntegrationTestBase`, and HTTP-level via `WebApplicationFactory<Program>`. xUnit + FluentAssertions; ALL tests use a `[Collection]` attribute and `IntegrationTestHelper.UniqueName()` for collision-free data; assert real DB state via polling; live infra with no DB reset. Covers base classes, fixtures/factories, helpers, and running tests.
registry.whenToRead: Writing, reviewing, or fixing backend integration tests; choosing the correct base class/style; ensuring isolation, unique test data, and real-state assertions.

registry.title: E2E Test Reference
registry.summary: Resilient Playwright E2E for the `playground-text-snippet` Angular app — Page Object Model on `BasePage`, Angular-aware waits (never `networkidle`), API-level arrange/cleanup via `ApiHelpers` in `afterEach`, `createTestTask()`/`createTestSnippet()` factories, priority tags (`@P0`–`@P3`), import `test`/`expect` from `utils/test-helpers`, and selectors only in page objects.
registry.whenToRead: Authoring or maintaining Playwright E2E tests, page objects, fixtures, or wait/assertion patterns for the frontend app.

registry.title: Project Structure Reference
registry.summary: Authoritative map of services, ports, directory layout, tech-stack versions, and module codes (all `file:line`-cited) — reusable framework set (`src/Platform/`) + layered example app (Api/Application/Domain/Infrastructure/Persistence) + Nx Angular frontend, orchestrated by Docker Compose. Covers service architecture, infra ports, CI/CD, and quick-start commands.
registry.whenToRead: Placing code in the correct project, looking up service ports/paths/module codes, tech-stack versions, or local startup commands.

registry.title: Code Review Rules
registry.summary: Repo-specific DO/DON'T review rules with real `file:line` anti-patterns — validation via `PlatformValidationResult` (never throw), side effects in entity event handlers, logic in lowest layer, DTO-owned mapping, RabbitMQ for cross-service, `AppBase*` frontend base classes. Includes backend/frontend/architecture rule sets, anti-patterns, decision trees, and checklists.
registry.whenToRead: Reviewing a PR or self-checking changes before commit; verifying repo-specific conventions instead of generic style advice.

registry.title: Feature Spec Reference
registry.summary: Conventions for business feature docs — 26-section template, `file:line` evidence for every test case, app-to-service mapping (`playground-text-snippet` → TextSnippet layers + `text-snippet-domain`), backend layer paths, feature-doc structure, templates, and coverage gaps. Docs live under `docs/business-features/{Module}/detailed-features/`.
registry.whenToRead: Creating or updating business feature documentation, or locating the backend/frontend layers and doc directory for a feature.

registry.title: Documentation Index Reference
registry.summary: Navigation map for the Easy.Platform docs (glob-verified counts) — documentation system overview, doc graph, key doc relationships, and a Doc Lookup Guide mapping tasks to the right doc. `docs/project-reference/` holds canonical AI-context docs; `docs/templates/` holds authoring templates.
registry.whenToRead: Finding which doc to open for a given task, or understanding the overall documentation structure and relationships.

registry.title: Lessons
registry.summary: Project-specific lessons-learned context referenced by skills and agents. Currently a template placeholder — populate with recurring failure modes and conventions as they are discovered.
registry.whenToRead: Checking for prior project-specific lessons before starting non-trivial work, or recording a new lesson learned.
